name: Dill Artichoke Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon snipped fresh dill OR, 2-3 teaspoons dried/dill
2 6 oz. jars marinated artichoke hearts, drained & sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes with a vegetable brush under running water.
2. In a Dutch oven, cook unpeeled potatoes, covered, in boiling lightly salted water, about 20 minutes or just until tender. Drain.
3. Cool potatoes.
4. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
5. In a very large bowl, stir together mayonnaise or salad dressing, vinegar, mustard, lemon-pepper seasoning, and dill.
6. Gently fold in cooked potatoes, eggs, artichoke hearts, onion, and pickle.
7. Cover and chill 4-24 hours.
8. Stir gently before serving.
